subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the signs of God and drawn to His fragrances in this most great century and most glorious cycle, wherein the realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله و منجذب بنفحات الله در این قرن اعظم و دور اکرم که حقائق
